text:

#TicTacChallenge #FunFriday #Refresher #TicTacMoment #GameOn

#TicTac #Refresh #Escape #Refreshment #Strawberry

CONTEST CLOSED
1. Comment below with the correct answer.
2. Like this post.
3. Follow us on Instagram to make your entry count!

Tag 2 friends who you would like to participate.
2 lucky Winners will win cool prizes!
The contest starts today and ends on 12th April, Sun. Winners will be announced on 13th April. Good luck!

*Terms & Conditions: 
1) Tic Tac Fun Friday Contest is open to Indian residents aged 18 years and above, except residents of Tamilnadu & Puducherry due to their state laws; and also excludes employees of Ferrero India and their immediate families. 
2) Three winners will be randomly selected from correct entries to receive the Tic Tac merchandise ; prizes are non-transferable, non-refundable, and cannot be exchanged for cash. 
3) Winners will be announced via our official Instagram handle. 
4) The Company reserves the right to modify or cancel the contest in case of unforeseen circumstances. This contest is not sponsored, endorsed or administered by Instagram. For queries, feel free to contact us.
5) Company will not be responsible and liable for any financial consequences under this contest.

#ContestAlert #TicTac #PlayandWin #Contest #Mango
